div.p: python def prepare_batch(sequences): # 1. Calculate static dimensions lengths = [len(s) for s in sequences] max_l = max(lengths) B = len(sequences)

pre.code:
# 2. Pre-allocate tensors on device ids = torch.zeros((B, max_l), dtype=torch.long) mask = torch.zeros((B, max_l), dtype=torch.long)
# 3. Scatter raw data into tensors for i, s in enumerate(sequences): ids[i, :len(s)] = torch.tensor(s) mask[i, :len(s)] = 1
return ids, mask
